amazon_product_details_section.Best Sellers Rank: 151 in Mobile Phone Portable Power Banks

features: Power Bank 10000mAh - The portable charger is compatible with virtually all USB rechargeable devices. The battery pack offers 2 charges for the iPhone 1 3, The updated portable power bank has a USB-C input and output that works perfectly with your new Phone

2 Inputs and 3 Outputs- The powerbank is equipped with two USB and one Type-C outputs. Faster charging than 2.0 output. You can quickly charge 3 devices at the same time, so you can share the convenience of power bank 10000mha with your family and friends

Compact and Portable- The small power bank is small but strong with the smallest dimension of 13.5 x 7 x 1.5cm and the lightest weight of 218g. Due to its light weight and thinness, it can easily be put in your carry-on bag or pocket and will not burden your travels

Reliable Li-Polymer Cell- We use high-quality lithium polymer batteries to extend the life of the external battery, we have carried out continuous aging and strict safety CE tests, resulting in a higher quality cell phone battery, safer and more stable charging
You Can Get - 1 x Power bank 10000mAh, 1 x Micro USB charging cable, 1 x User manual. Every GREPRO power bank has a 24-month-W and lifetime technical support
